## Problem

<!-- Concrete description of the change. For contract changes, include the

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you look at? Why was it not enough? -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Implementation matches the proposed signature / API
- [ ] Tests cover the new path (cargo test / vitest, as appropriate)
- [ ] README + inline docs updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added

## Out of scope

<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this issue? -->
